description.value:
You can grow into an enormous fungal beast. Once per day, you can cast plant form as a 5th-rank primal innate spell. When you reach 17th level, you can heighten the spell to 6th rank when you cast it. When you cast this spell, you gain the following special abilities:

Speed 30 feet

Resistances acid 10, poison 10

Melee 1 tendril (reach 20 feet), Damage 2d6 bludgeoning plus Grab.

Targets @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Grabbed] by your tendril take @Damage[2d4[persistent,poison]] damage.
